title: Skill Trigger Eval Query Set
description: Input format for eval_triggers.py. Array of labeled user queries used to measure how reliably a skill triggers (or stays out of the way).

query.description: Realistic user prompt. Vary phrasing, explicitness, detail, and complexity across the set.

should_trigger.description: Whether the skill ought to activate for this prompt. Negatives should include near-misses (same keywords, different actual need).

notes.description: Optional rationale — why this query is in the set. Useful when re-tuning.

split.description: Optional explicit split assignment. If omitted, eval_triggers.py partitions per --train-split.
